examples.title: Algorithm: Page Table Lookup
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PageTableLookup
INPUT: pageTable, logicalAddress, pageSize
OUTPUT: physicalAddress

BEGIN
 page := logicalAddress / pageSize
 frame := pageTable[page]
 offset := logicalAddress % pageSize
 physicalAddress := frame * pageSize + offset
 RETURN physicalAddress
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of page table lookup

examples.title: Python: Page Table Implementation
examples.description: Python implementation of a page table
examples.code:
class PageTable:
 def __init__(self, pageSize):
 self.pageSize = pageSize
 self.table = {}

 def addEntry(self, page, frame):
 self.table[page] = frame

 def lookup(self, logicalAddress):
 page = logicalAddress // self.pageSize
 frame = self.table.get(page)
 if frame is None:
 raise ValueError('Page not found')
 offset = logicalAddress % self.pageSize
 physicalAddress = frame * self.pageSize + offset
 return physicalAddress

# Example usage
pageSize = 4096
pageTable = PageTable(pageSize)
pageTable.addEntry(0, 10)
logicalAddress = 5000
physicalAddress = pageTable.lookup(logicalAddress)
print(physicalAddress)
examples.explanation: Key implementation details of page table in Python
